$description: Component tokens for Mobile Header Lite component - a lightweight header variant with optional back icon, image/avatar, title with optional info/error icons, subtitle, and optional end icon. Supports flexible content layout. Figma Reference: Node ID 320-14857

$component.name: Header Lite
$component.description: A lightweight mobile header component that provides minimal navigation and context at the top of mobile screens. Features optional leading back icon, flexible content section with image/avatar, title with optional info/error icons, subtitle text, and optional trailing end icon. Designed for compact layouts requiring minimal vertical space.
$component.structure: Container with horizontal flex layout. Contains left section (optional back icon + content group with image/avatar, icon, title with optional icons, subtitle) and right section (optional end icon). Layout uses flexbox with gap spacing between sections.

sizes.lg: 37px height - Large size variant, standard header lite height

end-icon.present: Trailing end icon (chevron-down) displayed on the right

actions-and-inputs.false: Standard layout without additional actions or inputs
actions-and-inputs.true: Layout with additional actions and inputs (future variant)

usage.contexts: Mobile app screens requiring compact headers, detail pages, list headers, navigation headers, content pages with minimal header space
usage.features: Optional leading back icon, Flexible content (image/avatar, icon, title with optional info/error icons, subtitle), Optional trailing end icon, Compact height design, Horizontal flex layout

container.$comment: Container tokens for mobile header lite - layout, height, and spacing

lg.description: Mobile header lite large size height - 36px (closest to 37px design spec)

sections.description: Mobile header lite gap between left and right sections - 24px

left.$comment: Left section tokens - back icon and content group

content.description: Mobile header lite gap between back icon and content group - 8px

back-icon.$comment: Back icon tokens - optional leading navigation icon

size.description: Mobile header lite back icon size - 18px

default.description: Mobile header lite back icon default color - neutral/gray-600 - #475467

content-group.$comment: Content group tokens - image/avatar, icon, title section, and subtitle

elements.description: Mobile header lite gap between content group elements (image, icon, title section) - 8px

image.$comment: Image/avatar tokens - optional image or avatar display

radius.description: Mobile header lite image border radius - 4px

width.description: Mobile header lite image border width - 1px

color.description: Mobile header lite image border color - neutral/gray-100 - #f2f4f7

background.description: Mobile header lite image background - neutral/white - #ffffff

icon.$comment: Icon tokens - optional icon displayed in content group

size.description: Mobile header lite content group icon size - 24px

default.description: Mobile header lite content group icon default color - neutral/gray-600 - #475467

title-section.$comment: Title section tokens - title text with optional info and error icons

elements.description: Mobile header lite gap between title section elements (title text, info icon, error icon) - 4px

typography.description: Mobile header lite title typography - 14px semibold, 20px line height

default.description: Mobile header lite title default color - neutral/gray-900 - #101828

info-icon.$comment: Info icon tokens - optional information icon

size.description: Mobile header lite title info icon size - 16px

default.description: Mobile header lite title info icon default color - neutral/gray-600 - #475467

error-icon.$comment: Error icon tokens - optional error/warning icon

size.description: Mobile header lite title error icon size - 16px

default.description: Mobile header lite title error icon default color - error/red-600 - #d92d20

typography.description: Mobile header lite subtitle typography - 12px regular, 17px line height

default.description: Mobile header lite subtitle default color - neutral/gray-500 - #667085

right.$comment: Right section tokens - optional trailing end icon

end-icon.$comment: End icon tokens - optional trailing icon (chevron-down)

size.description: Mobile header lite end icon size - 24px

default.description: Mobile header lite end icon default color - neutral/gray-600 - #475467
